# Konvo.Space
> Konvo.Space is the world's first Behavioral Internet, offering a secure compatibility Resonance Chamber, coordinate-matching twin agents, and direct human chat.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://konvo.space/): Access the main landing page and interactive compatibility and DNA Resonance Chamber.
- [Auth](https://konvo.space/auth): Secure registration, authentication, JWT tokens, and login portal.
- [Profile](https://konvo.space/profile): AST DNA, astrology calculations, and twin AI customization workspace.
- [Feedback](https://konvo.space/feedback): Submit user feedback, suggestions, and application bugs.

## Platform Features & APIs
- [Compatibility](https://konvo.space/compatibility): Discover matching profile details, compatibility indexes, and swipe panels.
- [Map](https://konvo.space/map): Dynamic resonance grid displaying real-time relative connection vectors.
- [Agents](https://konvo.space/agents): Manage and configure custom AI twin agents, query twin chat transcripts and logs.
- [Graph](https://konvo.space/graph): Visualize SVG topology nodes & edges for global connectivity patterns.
- [Communities](https://konvo.space/communities): Search and index communities, top contributors, and community health.

## Documentation
- [Full LLM Specification](https://konvo.space/llm-full.txt): Complete, detailed text file of site structures, API routes, and codebase mechanics.
